summary: Iteration 76 tested all new features: classe_esecuzione field in preventivo (fixed missing field in create/update), PATCH endpoint for material batches, firma_digitale in company settings, PDF generation with new fields. All 15 backend tests passed. UI verified: Preventivo editor has 'Classe di Esecuzione' dropdown, Settings page has 'Firma Digitale' upload section in Logo tab.
test_credentials: Test users created/cleaned during pytest run
seed_data_creation: Test preventivi, commesse, material_batches created during tests, cleaned up after
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 76 adds: (1) classe_esecuzione field to preventivo (EXC1-EXC4), (2) PATCH /api/commesse/{cid}/material-batches/{batch_id} for updating acciaieria and other fields, (3) firma_digitale in company settings (Logo tab), (4) PDF generators use classe_esecuzione, redatto_da from preventivo, and firma_digitale from company settings. BUG FIXED: classe_esecuzione was missing from preventivo create/update doc - added to doc dict in POST and to simple_fields list in PUT.

preventivo_classe_esecuzione_create.details: POST /api/preventivi with classe_esecuzione=EXC3 saves and returns correctly

preventivo_classe_esecuzione_update.details: PUT /api/preventivi/{id} updates classe_esecuzione from EXC1 to EXC4

patch_material_batch_multiple_fields.details: PATCH updates multiple fields: acciaieria, supplier_name, ddt_numero, posizione, n_pezzi, numero_certificato

company_settings_firma_digitale.details: PUT /api/company/settings saves firma_digitale as base64, GET returns it correctly

fascicolo_tecnico_context.details: GET /api/fascicolo-tecnico/{cid} returns fascicolo data for commessa linked to preventivo

scheda_rintracciabilita_pdf.details: GET /api/commesse/{cid}/scheda-rintracciabilita-pdf generates valid PDF with Acciaieria column

piano_controllo_pdf_redatto_da.details: GET /api/fascicolo-tecnico/{cid}/piano-controllo-pdf generates valid PDF (uses redatto_da from preventivo)

frontend_classe_esecuzione_dropdown.details: Preventivo editor shows 'Classe di Esecuzione' dropdown with default '-- Nessuna --'

frontend_firma_digitale_upload.details: Settings page Logo tab has 'Firma Digitale' section with file upload button

frontend_acciaieria_field.details: CommessaOpsPanel.js has acciaieria inline edit with data-testid='acciaieria-{batch_id}'

frontend_fascicolo_6_cards.details: FascicoloTecnicoSection.js DOCUMENTS array has 6 items: dop, ce, piano, vt, registro, riesame

bug_fixed.issue: classe_esecuzione field missing from preventivo create and update
bug_fixed.cause: Field was defined in PreventivoCreate model but not included in doc dict for POST, and not in simple_fields list for PUT
bug_fixed.fix: Added 'classe_esecuzione': data.classe_esecuzione to POST doc dict (line ~403), added 'classe_esecuzione' to simple_fields list in PUT (line ~429)
